name: Landorus (Therian)
description: The Abundance Pokémon. The energy that comes pouring from its tail increases the nutrition in the soil, making crops grow to great size.

abilities.name: Intimidate
abilities.description: Once per short rest, you can impose disadvantage on an enemy attack roll of your choice.

forms.description: Landorus's default form is Incarnate Forme. When given a Reveal Glass to hold, it can change to Therian Forme at will. In Incarnate Forme, its abilities are replaced with Sand Force and Sheer Force.
